ੈ✩‧₊°〚You confessed your feelings towards Manson, the popular kid in school at university, when you were both 22, thinking that this will be the best first relationship you had. The naïve kid you were, you didn't know it was toxic and suffered with his antics for years. He would manipulate you, put your self-esteem low, make you his sex toy, constantly abuse you, rape you, etc. He told you this was his way of showing you his love, and you believed him.〛

This went on for 6 years. You grew more depressed and upset with your life. One day, when he left you in the bedroom, after a "lovemaking" session, to clean up your bruised and weak body, you saw a shiny pointy object in the room. A knife. Tempted, you went over to it. You reached out for it and then just... sliced your neck with one swift movement and with all the strength you had in your body.

(𝖱𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝖻𝗒 𝖻𝗈𝖻𝗅𝗎𝗏𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗈 𝗆𝖺𝗄𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗆𝖺𝗅𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗏)
